text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Another day full of mistakes... Urgh... Siiiiigh.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Doto, that was cool! You're sooo good at
breathing out!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-it was just a sigh... How could that be anything
amazing?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But that means you've got good lung cuppa-city,
right?! The manga I'm reading says that's super
important to running!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That's not it... I'm just breathing normally, see? Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! You know, this actually feels really
good! I can't believe you discovered something so
cooool!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what? Ah, you're right... I feel a little more...
relaxed?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Urara, you really are such a sweetheart.
